channel.title: Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)
channel.description: Recent content in Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)

item.title: Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning - Introduction
item.description: In this chapter we emphasize the practical relevance of multi-target prediction problems. In addition, we name some special cases of multi-target prediction and establish the differences between transductive and inductive learning problems.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning - Loss Functions
item.description: In this chapter we introduce loss functions for multi-target prediction problems, explain the differences between instance-wise and decomposable losses and introduce the risk minimizer for both the hamming and 0/1 subset losses.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning - Methods 1
item.description: In this chapter we introduce the concepts of independent models for targets, mean regularization, stacking and weight sharing in DL.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Multitarget Learning - Methods 2
item.description: In this chapter we introduce the Kronecker kernel ridge regression, graph relations in targets, probabilistic classifier chains and low-rank approximations.
